p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: cargo_fmt, cargo_check_ty_python_semantic, cargo_clippy_ty_python_semantic, mdtest_with_sync. CI commands discovered from .github/workflows/ci.yaml: cargo fmt --all --check, cargo check -p ty_python_semantic, cargo clippy -p ty_python_semantic -- -D warnings, cargo test -p ty_python_semantic --test mdtest with/sync

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py: (1) Increased scan range from 200 to 300 lines - TypeAlias arm is at line ~3287, ~230 lines after function start at line 3058. (2) Fixed no_instance_fallback detection to only match code calls (policy.no_instance_fallback()) not comments - line 3275 has a comment with the word. (3) Fixed delegation test to handle multi-line expressions without braces - the arm_depth logic was ending the arm too early. All 11 tests pass on gold. NOP test correctly shows reward=0 with 3 fail-to-pass tests failing as expected.
